Name: m12_ToneMapBank
Description: Determines the parameters for tone maps.

Fields.Name: Near: Bloom Threshold %
Fields.Description: The threshold rate for near bloom.

Fields.Name: Near: Blood Magnification %
Fields.Description: The magnification rate for near bloom.

Fields.Name: Far: Bloom Threshold %
Fields.Description: The threshold rate for far bloom.

Fields.Name: Far: Blood Magnification %
Fields.Description: The magnification rate for far bloom.

Fields.Name: Near: Bloom Distance
Fields.Description: The distance of the bloom. In metres.

Fields.Name: Far: Bloom Distance
Fields.Description: The distance of the bloom. In metres.

Fields.Name: Tone Map Reference Value
Fields.Description: The gray key value. Higher values make the screen brighter, and vice versa.

Fields.Name: Minimum Adaptive Brightness
Fields.Description: The minimum level of adaptive brightness.

Fields.Name: Maximum Adaptive Brightness
Fields.Description: The maximum level of adaptive brightness.

Fields.Name: Adaptation Speed
Fields.Description: The speed of adaptive brightness changes.

Fields.Name: Light Shaft: Threshold %
Fields.Description: The threshold for the light shaft effect.

Fields.Name: Light Shaft: Strength
Fields.Description: The strength of the light shaft effect. 0 means no shaft.

Fields.Name: Light Shaft: Attenuation Rate
Fields.Description: The attenuation rate of the light shaft. Lower values mean shorter shaft.
